author: pascalicchio
text:
Hey HN! I've been building HackerStack.dev - a curated directory of the best AI tools for indie hackers.

What we have: - 49+ AI tools across 6 categories - Honest, unbiased reviews - Pricing comparisons - Use case guides

Built by indie hackers, for indie hackers. Would love your feedback! → https://hackerstack.dev
title: Show HN: HackerStack.dev – 49 Curated AI Tools for Indie Hackers
